ddls:
CREATE TABLE "personnel" (
  "personnel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each military personnel */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the military personnel */,
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rank of the military personnel */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position held by the military personnel */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the military personnel (e.g., Active, KIA, MIA) */,
  "note" TEXT /* Additional notes or information regarding the personnel */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the military personnel */,
  "blood_type" TEXT /* Blood type of the military personnel */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information of the military personnel */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the personnel's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the personnel's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("personnel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_personnel_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_personnel_rank_id FOREIGN KEY ("rank_id") REFERENCES ranks ("rank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position's responsibilities */,
  "hierarchy_level" INTEGER /* Hierarchy level of the position */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the position's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the position's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ranks" (
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rank */,
  "rank_name" TEXT /* Full name of the rank */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Standard abbreviation for the rank */,
  "hierarchy_level" INTEGER /* Hierarchy level of the rank */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rank's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rank's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "status_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "personnel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the personnel whose status is being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was updated */,
  "previous_status" TEXT /* Previous status of the personnel */,
  "new_status" TEXT /* New status of the personnel */,
  "update_note" TEXT /* Note or additional information about the status update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status update was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status update was last updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the personnel who made the status update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_status_updates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES personnel ("personnel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_status_updates_personnel_id FOREIGN KEY ("personnel_id") REFERENCES personnel ("personnel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "missions" (
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mission */,
  "mission_name" TEXT /* Name or code of the mission */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the mission */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the mission */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the mission */,
  "mission_note" TEXT /* Additional notes or information regarding the mission */,
  "mission_type" TEXT /* Type of mission (e.g., humanitarian, combat, peacekeeping) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mission's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mission's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "personnel_missions" (
  "personnel_mission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each personnel-mission association */,
  "personnel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the military personnel */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mission */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date when the personnel was deployed */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the personnel returned from the mission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the personnel in the mission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the personnel-mission association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the personnel-mission association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("personnel_mission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_personnel_missions_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_personnel_missions_personnel_id FOREIGN KEY ("personnel_id") REFERENCES personnel ("personnel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_clearance" (
  "clearance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security clearance */,
  "personnel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the personnel with the clearance */,
  "clearance_level" TEXT /* Level of security clearance */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date when the clearance was issued */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the clearance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the security clearance was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the security clearance was last updated */,
  "issued_by" INTEGER /* ID of the personnel who issued the security clearance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clearance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_clearance_personnel_id FOREIGN KEY ("personnel_id") REFERENCES personnel ("personnel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_clearance_issued_by FOREIGN KEY ("issued_by") REFERENCES personnel ("personnel_id")
)
